name: legion-orchestrate
description: Legion's dynamic MULTI-MODEL orchestrator — the ultracode loop (decompose -> fan out -> cross-model verify -> synthesize -> gate) made executor-aware: Opus conducts, GPT-5.4 does the bulk of coding in PARALLEL, GPT-5.5 verifies. Ships `legion-fanout` (run many scoped slices in parallel across executors via legion-delegate, collect verified diffs + cost, report) and a SKILL playbook with an LEGION_ULTRACODE max-exhaustive mode (wide fan-out, multi-vote cross-model verify, loop-until-dry). Ties together routing.toml + legion-delegate + legion-share to deliver features with codex carrying >=50% of the work.
